scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute aimgrim-db --local --file=migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute aimgrim-db --local --file=migrations/0002_seed_demo.sql
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 execute aimgrim-db --remote --file=migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute aimgrim-db --remote --file=migrations/0002_seed_demo.sql
